.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version constant from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to use the latest wrapper implementation.
Update the default download URL to point to the new Maven Wrapper artifact group (org.apache.maven.wrapper) compatible with version 3.1.1.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Apply modern Java coding conventions including brace placement, spacing, and license header formatting.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: public class MavenWrapperDownloader { ... } -> public class MavenWrapperDownloader \n { ... }

src/test/java/org/acme/GreetingResourceT.general_idea: Add JUnit 5 annotation to disable the test on Windows operating systems.
Change the HTTP GET request path from '/hello/world' to '/hello'.
Update the expected response body from 'Hola world' to 'Hello World'.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename the project artifact ID to a shorter, cleaner name.
Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM to version 3.19.4 to support Java 21 and modern APIs.
Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to version 3.14.0 for better Java 21 support.
Upgrade the Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.5.2.
Replace the deprecated RESTEasy Classic dependency with the new Quarkus REST (JAX-RS) implementation.
Add explicit Jackson JSON provider dependency for the new REST implementation.
Add SmallRye OpenAPI dependency for API documentation generation.
Add Hibernate ORM with REST Data Panache for simplified data access.
Add JDBC PostgreSQL driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add Quarkus OpenShift extension for Kubernetes/OpenShift deployment support.
Add SmallRye Health extension for application health monitoring.
Add the formatter-maven-plugin to enforce code formatting standards.
Move the failsafe plugin configuration out of the native profile to the main build section for consistency.
Simplify the native profile by removing redundant plugin definitions and using skipITs property.
Remove the failsafe.useModulePath property which is no longer needed in modern Maven/Java setups.

.gitignore.general_idea: Reorganize .gitignore to group Maven-related ignores at the top and remove redundant or IDE-specific entries.
.gitignore.human_impl: Moved #Maven block to top, removed .idea/ and *.iml entries.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .factorypath to .gitignore to exclude VS Code factory path configuration.
.gitignore.human_impl: Added .factorypath under # Visual Studio Code section.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .env to .gitignore to prevent committing local environment variables.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper distribution and JAR to newer versions compatible with modern build environments.
Add the Apache License 2.0 header to the Maven Wrapper properties file for compliance.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.human_impl:
# Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one
# or more contributor license agreements...

README.md.general_idea: Update the Quarkus Maven plugin version in the project generation command to match the newer Quarkus release.
Correct indentation of Java annotations and return statements in the tutorial code snippets.
Add the missing import statement for the GreetingService class in the Java code snippet.
Add a comprehensive tutorial section on using REST Data with Panache for CRUD operations.
Update the native executable build command to include the newer Quarkus CLI alternative.
Add instructions for deploying the application to an OpenShift cluster.
README.md.human_impl:
## Deploy to OpenShift cluster
oc apply -f ../kubernetes

README.md.general_idea: Add a placeholder section referencing Kubernetes deployment instructions.
README.md.human_impl:
## Deploy to Kubernetes
Check the info in [this branch]...

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Correct the script header comment to remove the outdated '2' from 'Maven2'.
mvnw.human_impl: Maven2 Start Up Batch script -> Maven Start Up Batch script

mvnw.general_idea: Add support for loading system-wide Maven configuration from /usr/local/etc/mavenrc.
Improve Java executable detection to avoid conflicts with shell functions named 'command'.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR from the deprecated Takari version to the official Apache Maven Wrapper.
Ensure partial or failed downloads of the wrapper JAR are removed to prevent corruption.
Pass MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS to the JVM to support debugging configurations.
Reformat JVM system properties for better readability and consistency.
mvnw.human_impl: Split long line with -Dmaven.home and -Dmaven.multiModuleProjectDirectory into separate lines

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to align with modern Maven standards.
Change the Maven Wrapper artifact group ID from io.takari to org.apache.maven.wrapper.
Replace deprecated %HOME% environment variable with %USERPROFILE% for better Windows compatibility.
Add usebackq option to FOR loop to correctly handle quoted file paths in properties file parsing.
Change exit command to cmd /C exit /B to ensure proper error code propagation in Windows CMD.
Update Apache License URL from http to https for security and modern standards.
Rename script header from 'Maven2' to 'Maven' to reflect current naming conventions.
Correct typo 'key stroke' to 'keystroke' in environment variable documentation.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Break long Java execution command into multiple lines using caret continuation for better readability.
Remove spaces around == in IF statements to ensure robust string comparison in batch scripts.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8/OpenJDK 11 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to align with the target Java version.
Remove the LANG environment variable as it is no longer required or supported in the new base image configuration.
Migrate JVM options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default tuning provided by the new container entrypoint script.
Remove the AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable which is likely obsolete or handled differently in the new base image.
Explicitly define the entrypoint to use the JBoss container run script, ensuring proper initialization for the new base image.
Update comments to reflect new debugging environment variables and JVM option handling in the new container image.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.human_impl: Added comments about JAVA_DEBUG=true and JAVA_OPTS_APPEND usage

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8/OpenJDK 11 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to align with the target Java version.
Update the Maven build command in comments to use the new Quarkus property for legacy jar packaging.
Move Quarkus-specific JVM options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default container JVM tuning.
Remove the deprecated AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable as it is no longer needed or supported in the new base image.
Remove the explicit LANG environment variable, relying on the base image defaults or LANGUAGE setting.
Explicitly define the entrypoint to use the standard Red Hat Java container run script.
Update documentation comments to reflect new debugging environment variables and JAVA_OPTS behavior.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.human_impl: Added instructions for JAVA_DEBUG=true and JAVA_DEBUG_PORT

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Update the comment to reflect the new Maven flag for native compilation.
Upgrade the base Docker image from UBI 8 to UBI 9 to align with newer JDK/runtime requirements.
Add documentation explaining the base image version and how to switch to UBI 8 if needed.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.human_impl:
+# The ` registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal:9.5` base image is based on UBI 9.
+# To use UBI 8, switch to `quay.io/ubi8/ubi-minimal:8.10`.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Explicitly set executable permissions on the application binary during the COPY step.
Replace CMD with ENTRYPOINT to ensure the application binary is always executed as the main process.
